channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Do ‘Disclosure Day’ Prep With a Spielberg Sci-Fi Marathon
item.description: Live in New York and excited for 'Disclosure Day'? There's a month-long screening of Spielberg sci-fi films to get you in the mood.

item.title: I’m finally playing Eastshade, and it’s turned me into a travelling painter who really cares about artistic composition
item.description: Finally diving into Eastshade has been a breath of slow-paced, travelling-painter fresh air, and I can’t stop painting everything.

item.title: I took a ride in an Nvidia-powered autonomous Mercedes at GTC 2026 - and it’s convinced me this is the future
item.description: My ride in a Nvidia-powered autonomous car is definitely bringing me round to this future driving technology.

item.title: Austria is pursuing a social media ban for kids under 14
item.description: Austria is the latest country to prepare a social media ban for its children, but it's going even further than others by including anyone under 14. In a press release, the Austrian government said it has introduced a comprehensive catalogue of measures meant to shield minors from the harms of social media. According to the press release, an official bill will be introduced by the end of June. Andreas Babler, a vice chancellor and leader of the Social Democratic Party of Austria, said the government's efforts would include the new age restriction, improved media literacy and clear rules for soc...

item.title: 139 voitures électriques analysées sur long trajet, la nouvelle Xiaomi SU7, la Renault Twingo bientôt à 11 000 € ? – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: La semaine était électrique sur Survoltés : on a conduit la nouvelle voiture électrique de Xiaomi, la Renault Twingo électrique va devenir encore moins chère (et on a pu la tester), et surtout 139 voitures électriques ont été comparé sur longs trajets.

item.title: IKEA spring bedroom trends: refresh your space with muted gray and seafoam accessories
item.description: Get your bedroom springtime-ready with cooling bedding, useful gadgets and charming accessories.

item.title: ‘My mirrorless camera didn’t get a look in’ – the DJI Osmo Action 4 was my ultimate vacation camera, and it just dropped to a record-low price
item.description: This rugged, waterproof action cam is perfect for taking on adventures, and now's the time to buy.

item.title: Ranking 2016’s Superhero Debuts, 10 Years Later
item.description: From 'Batman v Superman' to 'Captain America: Civil War' and 'Suicide Squad,' which superhero from 2016 made the most enduring impression?

item.title: Cet écran gaming OLED (240 Hz, 0,03 ms) équipé de l’Ambiglow peut se trouver pour 130 euros de moins chez Boulanger
item.description: Le Philips Evnia est un écran gaming très complet renforcé par la technologie Ambiglow. En ce moment chez Boulanger, il est vendu pour 419,99 euros au lieu de 549,99 euros.
